chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 139 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.463/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.464/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.06.2025 None present, nor has any intimation been received. Record reflects that prior to approaching this Court, the petitioner had filed an application under Sections 22-A & B, Cr.P.C., bearing Crl. Misc. Application No.3513 of 2024 before the learned Additional Sessions Judge-IV / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur, which was disposed of vide order dated 23.08.2024, wherein protection had already been granted. The operative para of the said order is reproduced below: “ I have heard arguments and perused the record. The police through their reports have denied the allegations of the applicant and undertaken that they have neither illegally harassed the applicant nor shall do so. However, valuable rights of every individual are guaranteed under the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, therefore, the official respondents SHOs PS Tando Masti and Kotdiji are directed not to harass the applicant without due course of law and provide her legal protection as and when she approaches, strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant application is disposed of.” Perusal of the prayer clause of the instant petition reflects that it is identical in nature and a repetition of the same relief sought earlier. Accordingly, the petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with the listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
